title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Saksoft Global Group

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Saksoft Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Saksoft Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Saksoft Global Group:
Saksoft Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft Global Group!
